intro: 21+, valid ID required. Drink responsibly, hydrate between stops, use Disney transport (never drive).

groups.title: 🚝 Monorail Resort Bar Crawl
groups.note: No park ticket needed — free Resort Monorail loop. 3-5hrs full crawl.

items.name: 1. Disney's Contemporary Resort
items.desc: Steakhouse 71 Lounge — 1971 Sunset cocktail. Also: California Grill Lounge (fireworks view).

items.name: 2. Disney's Polynesian Village Resort
items.desc: Trader Sam's Grog Grotto — Uh-Oa or HippopotoMai-Tai (long wait, no windows/fireworks view). Backup: Trader Sam's Tiki Terrace (same menu, outdoor). Also: Tambu Lounge — Lapu Lapu.

items.name: 3. Disney's Grand Floridian Resort & Spa
items.desc: Enchanted Rose — Lavender Fog or espresso martini. Also: Citrico's Lounge (no reservation needed).

items.name: Route
items.desc: TTC → Poly → Grand Floridian → Contemporary → TTC (loop, any direction/start point). Monorail runs 30min before MK open to 1hr after close.

groups.title: 🌍 EPCOT — Drinking Around the World
groups.note: 11 pavilions, World Showcase, 1.2mi loop. Most start Mexico or Canada, go clockwise. 4-6hrs.

items.name: 1. Mexico
items.desc: La Cava del Tequila — Avocado Margarita. Faster: Choza de Margarita (frozen).

items.name: 2. Norway
items.desc: Kringla Bakeri og Kafe — Viking Coffee (w/ aquavit) or Nordic Draft Beer.

items.name: 3. China
items.desc: Joy of Tea — Tipsy Ducks in Love (bourbon/black tea) or Dragon Butterfly (gin/vodka/boba).

items.name: 4. Africa Outpost
items.desc: Refreshment Outpost — seasonal, rotates w/ festivals.

items.name: 5. Germany
items.desc: Sommerfest — Schöfferhofer Pink Grapefruit Hefeweizen. Hidden: Weinkeller back-of-shop bar (Mozart Chocolate Liqueur).

items.name: 6. Italy
items.desc: Tutto Gusto Wine Cellar — Italian wine flight/limoncello flight. Or Gelateria Toscana — Italian Margarita (frozen).

items.name: 7. American Adventure
items.desc: Regal Eagle Smokehouse — Samuel Adams Boston Lager or Moonshine Sour. Good midpoint food stop.

items.name: 8. Japan
items.desc: Kabuki Cafe — Violet Sake or Sake Mist (flavored shaved-ice). Hidden: Sake Bar upstairs (Mitsukoshi/Teppan Edo area).

items.name: 9. Morocco
items.desc: Spice Road Table bar — Moroccarita or signature sangria.

items.name: 10. France
items.desc: Les Vins de France (hidden shop bar) or Grand Marnier slushy.

items.name: 11. United Kingdom
items.desc: Rose & Crown Pub — half cider/half lager, or gin selection.

items.name: 12. Canada
items.desc: Popcorn cart — Ottawa Apple (Crown Royal/maple/cranberry). Hidden: Trading Post Refreshments (back of gift shop).
